creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Just a FYI:
Driver version 535.154.05 is out at 2024.1.16, but as the release-highlight doesn't states about addition/bump/deletion of files including libraries, I have no plan to file a PR for it.

Basically, I file a PR for this when any of production, new feature or beta branch of driver states addition/bump/deletion of files including libraries, but no one else seem to woring on it.
But if Austin Shafer files PR for graphics/nvidia-drm-*-kmod part but no one else seems to working on x11/nvidia-driver side (including x11/linux-nvidia-libs) and I could take time for it, I'll follow it.

Note that I have no plan for legacy drivers, because of the lack of hardware to test.
